assertion.description: State should contain a summary field

assertionResults.actual: Codebase structure: a small TypeScript library with three source files. `src/math.ts` defines three named numeric helpers: `add`, `subtract`, and `multiply`. `src/utils.ts` defines two string helpers: `capitalize` and `slugify`. `src/index.ts` is the public barrel file that re-exports all five functions from the two implementation modules. The project has a clear separation between math utilities and string utilities, with `index.ts` serving as the main entry point.

assertion.description: State should list the files found
State should confirm fix was applied

assertionResults.actual: export { sumItems, calculateAverage } from "./math.js";

removeItem should assign the filtered result
getTotal should multiply price by quantity
pop/peek should throw on empty stack
user.ts should not use string interpolation for id
product.ts should not use string interpolation for name
order.ts should not use string interpolation for userId
review.ts should not have old schema name
Report should mention the largest file
